title: [MTR4] JR East E233 Series | JR東日本 E233系
description: The resourcepack that adds E233 series into minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway mod
body:
# Orerview
The E233 series (E233系) is a commuter and suburban electric multiple unit (EMU) train type developed by East Japan Railway Company (JR East) from the earlier E231 series and the E531 series design. The first train was introduced in December 2006 for use on the Chūō Line (Rapid), followed by the E233-1000 series variant in 2007 for use on the Keihin–Tōhoku and Negishi lines, the E233-3000 series outer-suburban variant in December 2007 for use on the Tōkaidō Main Line, and narrow-bodied E233-2000 series variant for Jōban Line and Tokyo Metro Chiyoda Line through services. Further variants were built for use on the Keiyō Line, Yokohama Line, Saikyō Line, and Nambu Line.                                                                 
                                                                                             
The E233 series features two identical sets of main equipment in case of failure. This is the first JR East stock to feature such backup measures. The E233 series provides for better accessibility for the disabled, and is designed to be more comfortable to ride overall than previous stock. The height between the platform and the train was reduced from the 80 mm (3.1 in) of the 201 and 209 series to only 30 mm (1.2 in). Seats are 460 mm (18.1 in) wide, compared to the 430 mm (16.9 in) of the 201 series and 450 mm (17.7 in) of the 209 series.For standing passengers the handle straps have been lowered by 50 mm (2.0 in) compared to older 
train models.
## This pack includes:
### E233 Series:
- E233-0
- E233-1000
- E233-3000
- E233-5000
- E233-6000
- E233-7000
- E233-8000
### New motor sound for:
- E233 Series (Mitsubishi IGBT and Hitachi IGBT)
## My suggestion:
### E233 series (except E233-3000)
- Acceleration and deceleration: 2.0 - 2.5 km/h/s
- Average speed: 60 - 100 km/h or 120 km/h max
### E233 3000
- Acceleration and deceleration: 2.5 - 2.9 km/h/s
- Average speed: 100 - 120 km/h
## Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, East Japan Railway Company
**Tested on Minecraft 1.20.1 MTR 4.0.3 Forge**
